# `PromptResult`

The raw result returned by a prompt engine for a single prompt.

- `answered: true` — user provided a value
- `answered: false` — user cancelled/aborted (Ctrl+C, ESC, etc.)

Coercion to the flag's kind is the resolver's responsibility, not the
prompt engine's.

- Import: `dreamcli`
- Export kind: type
- Declared in: `src/core/schema/prompt.ts`
- Source link: [`src/core/schema/prompt.ts:127`](https://github.com/kjanat/dreamcli/blob/master/src/core/schema/prompt.ts#L127)

## Signatures

```ts
type PromptResult =
  | { answered: 'true'; value: unknown }
  | { answered: 'false' };
```
